naming_scheme.description: Keys are compact abbreviations used in result folder and condition names; values describe the configuration setting.

codes.LRG: Large Agent B language-model size tier (7.0B-8.0B parameters)
codes.MED: Medium Agent B language-model size tier (3.0B-3.8B parameters)
codes.PH3: Phi-3 Mini 3.8B via Ollama language model
codes.SML: Small Agent B language-model size tier (1.0B-1.5B parameters)
codes.ULM: Agent A UserLM caller using the selected language model

research_objective: Measure whether two cooperative route-planning agents converge on valid, constraint-fitting routes through natural speech dialog.
hypotheses: Valid route proposals should appear before secondary optimization.
Persona constraints should change route comparisons across time, fullness, transfers, and delay risk.
Speech-enabled runs should preserve route semantics while adding measurable automatic speech recognition, text-to-speech, and runtime phases.

loaded_job.name: transformers_medium_qwen2_5_1_5b
loaded_job.description: Medium-lite Transformers Agent B multilingual condition.
